title: language setup
text: language setup A group of language-specific definitions for date and time formats, text editor messages, panel button texts, labels for character attributes, Japanese emperor eras, and default answers for the askmess ProcScript statement. Related Links global object An object in a runtime library that is available to all components on a given host. Global objects include global ProcScript modules, constants, messages, menus, panels, and messages. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
